hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.path'); branch=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.branch // empty'); git -C /Users/jgs/workspace/Termostato worktree add "$path" ${branch:+-b "$branch"} 2>/dev/null || git -C /Users/jgs/workspace/Termostato worktree add "$path"
input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.path'); git -C /Users/jgs/workspace/Termostato worktree remove --force "$path" 2>/dev/null || true
